protocol.cost_default: 6bp/side for current scans; older alt_oi_taker artifact used 5bp/side
protocol.strict_mdd: includes in-position adverse excursion and period-contained exits
protocol.promotion_rule: Do not promote because leverage can lift CAGR/MDD; alpha itself must survive test and eval.
protocol.trading_target_asset: BTC. External/cross-asset features may be used as inputs, but alpha entries here trade BTC unless explicitly stated otherwise.
protocol.alpha_pool_threshold: A strategy may stay as alpha_pool candidate only if it exceeds CAGR/strict_MDD >= 2.5 on test2024 after being combined with other features/gates; otherwise record as weak/rejected feature/selector evidence.
protocol.live_grade_threshold: Live-grade single strategy must exceed CAGR/strict_MDD >= 3.0 as a standalone strategy, with strict MDD and period-end forced close.
protocol.below_threshold_policy: Rows below alpha_pool_threshold should not be treated as alpha candidates; keep them as feature/selector candidates unless portfolio marginal contribution later proves value.

trade_orthogonality.decision_unit: Actual executable trades, not raw feature activation.
required_metrics: candidate entry fraction within a preregistered near-time window of baseline entries
zero-filled daily marked-to-market PnL Pearson and Spearman correlations
trade_orthogonality.feature_correlation_role: Feature Pearson/Spearman/phi is diagnostic only and cannot establish portfolio independence.
trade_orthogonality.undefined_policy: Fail closed when daily PnL correlation is undefined or support is below the declared minimum.
trade_orthogonality.economic_gate: Orthogonality is necessary for diversification but never sufficient for promotion; the candidate must independently pass return, full-calendar CAGR, strict MDD, trade-support, cost/funding, and causal execution checks.
trade_orthogonality.selection_guard: Freeze the policy and orthogonality limits before opening a future window. Do not rank or tune candidates on future-window correlation.

entries.name: REX dual-regime rule-gate sleeve
entries.description: No-LLM REX sleeve that executes only exported dual-regime rule-gate predictions. This replaces raw/source_all REX: source_action rows are ignored unless prediction.gate=TRADE.
entries.entry_logic: Load rex_dual_regime_*_predictions_2026-07-03.jsonl and execute only rows with prediction.gate=TRADE, using prediction.side and prediction.hold_bars. Do not execute source_action/source_all raw REX candidates.
entries.exit_logic: fixed hold from prediction.hold_bars; entry at signal_pos+1; period-end forced liquidation in strict evaluation.
entries.evidence: docs/rex-no-llm-standalone-check-2026-07-10.md shows raw/source_all REX is weak, while fixed rule_gate clears the intended 2025 and 2026YTD CAGR/MDD threshold. Portfolio append_rex paths already use prediction.gate=TRADE; alpha pool now records that raw REX is rejected.
entries.leakage_notes: Use exported prediction rows only; source_action/source_all is diagnostic raw REX and must not be promoted. Regime gates are fixed artifacts, not recalibrated on eval/ytd windows.
entries.next_action: Keep as rex_rule_gate / no-LLM rule-gated sleeve; do not use raw REX in portfolio searches or live configs.

entries.next_action: Do not count as alpha_pool candidate until a feature/gate/exit combination clears test2024 CAGR/MDD >=2.5; use as selector feature in future scans.

entries.leakage_notes: OOS scan-table selection risk is too high; candidate status would overstate evidence. Keep weak until predeclared rolling validation proves otherwise.

entries.name: Long union range/momentum/funding/compression breakout
entries.description: Long-regime BTCUSDT union strategy that fires when any of four interpretable setup components are active: upper range breakout, HTF momentum with acceptable 30d position, low-funding trend squeeze, or compression breakout.
entries.entry_logic: OR union of range_bb90, mom85_pos50, funding10_trend70, compress05_trend80. range_bb90=(rex_576_range_width_pct>=0.1295981611 and bb_z>=1.6850824974); mom85_pos50=(htf_1d_return_4>=0.0691416467 and rex_8640_range_pos>=0.1127012517); funding10_trend70=(funding_rate<=-0.0000167 and trend_96>=0.0074852182); compress05_trend80=(rex_2016_range_width_pct<=0.0507431447 and trend_24>=0.0047972289).
entries.exit_logic: fixed hold 576 5m bars (48h), stride 12 bars, next-open entry, 0.5x leverage in validation; split/window-end forced close via strict simulator.
entries.evidence: First long-regime candidate in this branch to clear CAGR/strict_MDD >=3 on 2024 test, 2025 eval, 2026H1, and combined 2024~2026H1 while keeping nontrivial trade count. Discovered after moving away from pullback-only gates to explicit alpha-family union.
entries.leakage_notes: Thresholds are train<2024 quantiles, but union composition was selected after inspecting discovery/validation tables through 2026H1. This is candidate-grade, not final clean unseen proof. Do not live-size without predeclared rolling validation or fresh out-of-sample data.
entries.next_action: Run rolling/month-block validation, ablation/marginal contribution checks, and live-sim conversion under long regime only. If stable, create configs/live candidate with the same fixed thresholds and hold semantics.

entries.name: Bear-regime REX short reclaim/failure sleeve
entries.description: Short-only REX/LLM sleeve for persistent bearish regimes. Executes exported prediction.gate=TRADE and prediction.side=SHORT from the rex_htf_pullback_reclaim family.
entries.entry_logic: Manual/higher-level bear regime must be active. Then execute prediction rows where gate=TRADE and side=SHORT from results/rex_dual_regime_eval_2025_2026h1_predictions_2026-07-03.jsonl.
entries.exit_logic: Fixed hold 144 5m bars, next-open entry, 0.5x validation leverage; live pilot config currently uses max_holding_bars=144 and allowed_signals=[SHORT].
entries.evidence: Hand-built short rule families failed as universal short alphas, but the REX short prediction sleeve clears CAGR/strict_MDD >=3 in the intended bear-regime window 2025~2026H1 with 49 trades and low strict MDD.
entries.leakage_notes: Candidate is regime-conditional and based on prior exported predictions. It should not be judged as all-market universal short; conversely, it must not be traded unless bearish regime is declared without looking ahead.
entries.next_action: Implement/verify live dry-run bridge for this sleeve under require_bear_regime=true, and regenerate train-only predictions for future rolling validation.

usage_recipe.entry_logic: bear regime gate + REX prediction gate=TRADE side=SHORT
usage_recipe.exit_logic: fixed hold 144 bars; next-open entry; strict short MDD uses intrabar highs

evaluation_protocol.cost: fee_rate=0.0004 and slippage_rate=0.0001 per side as strict simulator params
evaluation_protocol.mdd: strict short MDD includes intrabar high adverse excursion and full calendar idle time in CAGR denominator

promotion_guardrails: Require explicit non-lookahead bearish regime gate
Do not combine with long-regime sleeve unless portfolio allocator enforces regime separation
Regenerate prediction file from documented train-only process before production sizing

entries.name: Non-REX FX-stress BTC short
entries.description: Short-only BTCUSDT sleeve for persistent bearish regimes using BTC 3-day weakness plus USD/KRW stress. This is deliberately independent from REX state and is intended as a separate short alpha family.
entries.entry_logic: Manual/higher-level bear regime must be active. Enter short when htf_3d_return_1 <= -0.0325294973 (train q0.20) and usdkrw_zscore >= 1.3870063775 (train q0.90).
entries.exit_logic: Short TP 4%, SL 2.5%, maximum hold 288 5m bars (24h), next-open entry. Conservative same-bar assumption: SL before TP.
entries.evidence: Found after excluding REX: event/blowoff/liquidation shorts were weak, but FX-stress + BTC HTF weakness with short-specific TP/SL produced a bear-regime candidate with ratio >3 and nontrivial trades. Conservative q0.20 variant is preferred because 2024 remains positive and lower MDD than q0.30.
entries.leakage_notes: This is not an unseen-proof final strategy: TP/SL and q variant were chosen after inspecting bear windows. Must be revalidated via rolling/fresh data before live sizing.
entries.next_action: Run predeclared rolling validation and then test portfolio marginal contribution against bear_rex_short_reclaim_20260710.

usage_recipe.entry_logic: bear regime gate + htf_3d_return_1 <= -0.0325294973 + usdkrw_zscore >= 1.3870063775
usage_recipe.exit_logic: TP=4%, SL=2.5%, max_hold=288 5m bars, next-open entry

evaluation_protocol.mdd: strict short MDD includes intrabar high adverse excursion; CAGR denominator includes idle time

promotion_guardrails: Keep separate from REX state to measure true diversification
usage_recipe.live_use_notes: Candidate only; good next target for paper/live-sim after rolling validation.

entries.name: Non-REX premium-discount panic BTC short
entries.description: Short-only BTCUSDT sleeve for persistent bearish regimes using low HTF range position plus deeply negative premium_index_zscore. This is independent of REX and distinct from FX-stress short.
entries.entry_logic: Manual/higher-level bear regime must be active. Enter short when htf_3d_range_pos <= -0.5114186851 (train q0.20) and premium_index_zscore <= -1.4720931200 (train q0.10).
entries.exit_logic: Short TP 2.5%, SL 1.5%, maximum hold 288 5m bars (24h), next-open entry. Conservative same-bar assumption: SL before TP.
entries.evidence: Found after filtering non-REX candidates. Conservative TP2.5/SL1.5 version has better 2024 stability; TP4/SL2.5 version has stronger bear_combined but weaker 2024. Both indicate premium-discount panic continuation is a real short-feature family.
entries.leakage_notes: Exit choice inspected OOS windows. Candidate only until rolling/fresh validation confirms.
entries.next_action: Run rolling validation and portfolio marginal contribution against nonrex_fx_stress_short_20260710 and bear_rex_short_reclaim_20260710.

entries.name: Non-REX premium-discount + kimchi-unwind BTC short
entries.description: Bear-regime short union combining premium-discount panic and kimchi-unwind weakness. This uses two independent non-REX short contexts: derivatives discount/panic plus Korea premium unwind.
entries.entry_logic: Manual/higher-level bear regime must be active. Enter short when either premium_panic=(htf_3d_range_pos <= -0.5114186851 and premium_index_zscore <= -1.47209312) OR kimchi_unwind=(htf_3d_return_1 <= -0.0303196833 and kimchi_premium_change <= -0.0046123752).
entries.exit_logic: Short TP 4%, SL 2.5%, max hold 288 5m bars (24h), next-open entry. Conservative same-bar assumption: SL before TP.
entries.evidence: Selector overlay scan shows premium_panic + kimchi_unwind union improves bear combined return and trade count versus premium-only while keeping 2024 positive. It is weaker than premium+sellflow in bear ratio but far more robust in 2024. Strategy review accepted this as alpha-grade for bearish regimes because shorts should not be penalized as universal all-market strategies when the declared use case is major downtrends.
entries.leakage_notes: Union composition was selected after inspecting 2024/2025/2026H1 overlay results; candidate-grade until predeclared rolling or fresh validation.
entries.next_action: Treat as promoted bear-regime alpha; run rolling/marginal-contribution validation versus premium-only, FX-stress, and REX before live sizing.

usage_recipe.entry_logic: bear regime gate + (premium_panic OR kimchi_unwind)
usage_recipe.exit_logic: TP=4%, SL=2.5%, max_hold=288 5m bars

evaluation_protocol.mdd: strict short MDD includes intrabar high adverse excursion; CAGR denominator includes idle time

promotion_guardrails: Compare against premium-only to avoid double-counting same edge
2024 under-threshold ratio is acceptable only when classified as non-bear/regime mismatch, not as live failure.
Must be disabled outside operator/declarative bear regime.

entries.promotion_basis: Promoted by user/strategy review as a bear-regime alpha: short sleeves are expected to be difficult in bullish regimes, so 2024 under-threshold behavior is treated as regime mismatch rather than disqualification. Still requires non-lookahead bear-regime gate for use.

entries.name: Long minimal funding/premium squeeze (2026-07-10, audited 2026-07-12)
entries.description: BTCUSDT long alpha using low/negative funding with positive 96-bar trend, or premium-index compression with strong completed daily momentum.
entries.entry_logic: OR union of funding10_trend70 and premium20_mom90. funding10_trend70=(funding_rate<=-0.0000167 and trend_96>=0.0074852182); premium20_mom90=(premium_index_change<=-0.00023471 and htf_1d_return_4>=0.0940403009).
entries.exit_logic: Fixed hold 576 bars, stride 12, non-overlapping event execution. Exit sweep found no globally better TP/SL than no explicit TP/SL; 10% TP improves 2025 slightly but worsens train risk ratio.
entries.evidence: Extended validation keeps this as a candidate: train 2020-2023 abs +140.66%, CAGR 24.55%, strict MDD 15.32%, ratio 1.60, 206 trades; test 2024 +31.04%, ratio 5.28, 29 trades; eval 2025 +18.33%, ratio 3.69, 26 trades; ytd 2026 +12.12%, ratio 6.95, 29 trades.
entries.leakage_notes: Logical audit found no direct future-reference in feature construction: funding/premium are backward-asof joined; premium close_time is used as availability time; premium_index_change is a past 96-row diff; trend_96 uses close.shift(95); htf_1d_return_4 uses previous completed daily bars via htf.shift(1) then backward-asof. Caveat: thresholds come from earlier scan artifacts and should be treated as selected knowledge, not fresh unseen discovery; live must use only published funding history/premium closes, not next funding estimates.
entries.next_action: Use as long-regime candidate feature/alpha, but re-audit threshold provenance and run rolling/month-block validation before live promotion. Train-window MDD 15.32% and train ratio 1.60 are below target, so do not mark live-grade.

entries.name: Low-correlation FX-stress short with tight exit
entries.description: BTC weakness plus elevated USDKRW stress, using a tight asymmetric TP/SL. Low activation correlation to the existing long-alpha complex and moderate correlation to the promoted premium+kimchi short union.
entries.exit_logic: TP 2.5%, SL 1.5%, maximum hold 288 5m bars; conservative same-bar stop-before-take ordering; next-open entry.
entries.evidence: At 6bp/side and 0.5x, clears alpha-pool test/eval ratio>=2.5 while staying nearly orthogonal to long alpha components. It is not live-grade and 2026 ratio is weak.
entries.leakage_notes: Gate thresholds came from train quantiles. Exit variant selected on test2024; eval2025 confirms, while 2026 must not be used for retuning.
entries.next_action: Keep in alpha_pool as a diversifying candidate; run portfolio marginal-contribution test using test-only weights. Do not live-promote unless fresh data improves the weak 2026 behavior.

usage_recipe.exit_logic: short TP 2.5%, SL 1.5%, cap 288 bars

evaluation_protocol.mdd: strict intrabar short MDD

entries.name: Low-corr Alpha101 early pullback long (2026-07-12)
entries.description: Weak standalone long candidate using early-session short-term pullback, low return/volume correlation, and low absolute-return-volume rank. Its main value is low correlation to existing alpha components, not standalone strength.
entries.entry_logic: a_ret_z_12 <= -0.1039416971 AND a_early_session >= 0.5 AND a_ret_vol_corr_288 <= 0.0102425402 AND a_absret_vol_rank <= 0.4943800277.

entries.leakage_notes: Thresholds are train quantiles and features are causal, but the candidate was selected after inspecting OOS diagnostics. Not live-grade.
entries.next_action: Use only as a low-correlation feature/gate candidate for RLLM or portfolio selector; do not allocate standalone live capital.

entries.name: Low-correlation USDKRW risk-off weakness short
entries.description: Short BTC when USDKRW momentum is in an extreme train-window upper tail while BTC 1d return is in an extreme lower tail. Uses tight TP/SL and has low activation correlation to existing alpha components.
entries.exit_logic: TP 2.5%, SL 1.5%, maximum 216 5m bars, stride 12, next-open entry.
entries.evidence: Among 1,850 low-correlation macro-short variants, this test-selected candidate clears test/eval ratio>=3 at 6bp/side but fails 2026 and has sparse OOS trades.
entries.leakage_notes: Thresholds fit on train; exit variant ranked on test2024; eval2025 confirms mechanically. YTD2026 is consumed and negative; no 2026 retuning allowed.

entries.name: REX HTF pullback reclaim recent-regime event
entries.description: Event-first REX candidate: trade multiscale higher-timeframe pullback reclaim events. Recent 2025/2026 holdout is promising, but long train is weak and high-MDD, so this is regime-context only, not standalone live-grade.
entries.entry_logic: family=rex_htf_pullback_reclaim, hold_bars=144, quantile=0.75. Threshold 0.2143444289 fit on train 2020-2024 only in recent split. Direction follows higher-timeframe pullback/reclaim event direction from causal REX/HTF features.
entries.exit_logic: Fixed hold 144 5m bars, entry delay 1 bar, stride 24 in scan, non-overlapping strict simulator, 0.5x validation leverage, 6bp side cost model.
entries.evidence: Event-first scan selected this using train+test only; eval was not used for selection. Recent split clears ratio>=3 on 2025 and 2026H1 under full-window CAGR, but fails long train risk, so treat as regime-conditioned context feature rather than standalone alpha.
entries.leakage_notes: Thresholds fit on train only; test selected; eval post-selection. Features are rolling/current-row causal. Needs independent revalidation before live use.
entries.next_action: Use as RLLM/portfolio event context and diagnose train high-MDD regime before promotion.

entries.name: REX event side-controller recent candidate
entries.description: Side-filtered REX HTF pullback reclaim event. Improves recent 2025/2026 performance by allowing LONG only in deep RSI pullback and SHORT only in high realized range, but fails broad 2025-2026 eval when selected on 2024, so it is an RLLM context prior rather than standalone alpha.
entries.entry_logic: Base event rex_htf_pullback_reclaim@h144@q0.75. Recent selected side rules: LONG if rsi_norm <= -0.3052479583; SHORT if range_vol >= 0.0215245647. All thresholds fit on train side-event distributions.
entries.exit_logic: Fixed hold 144 5m bars, 1-bar entry delay, stride 24, non-overlapping strict simulator.
entries.evidence: Recent split passes test/eval ratio, but broad split final eval fails. Do not promote to live-grade; use as prompt/context structure for RLLM side reasoning.
entries.leakage_notes: Base event threshold and side-rule thresholds fit on train only. Test used for selection; eval was not used. Broad split failure is recorded as anti-overfit evidence.
entries.next_action: Feed event+side-context into RLLM meta-controller; do not trade statically.

entries.name: Funding-relief / FX-stress bidirectional BTC policy
entries.description: One-position-at-a-time BTC policy: long on negative-funding plus taker-flow recovery, short on USDKRW risk-off stress plus BTC daily weakness.
entries.entry_logic: LONG: funding_rate <= -0.0000167 and taker-flow acceleration >= 0.0408248038. SHORT: usdkrw_momentum >= 0.0026584831 and htf_1d_return_1 <= -0.0340374575.
entries.exit_logic: TP4%, SL2.5%, maximum 288 5m bars, stride 6, next-open entry.
entries.evidence: Only one of 2,456 bidirectional variants cleared test/eval ratio>=2.5. Direction ablation was positive in 2026 but combined opportunity blocking made the actual one-position policy negative.
entries.leakage_notes: Thresholds train-fit; variant selected on test2024; eval confirms mechanically. 2026 is consumed and failed; no overlap/priority retuning against 2026.
entries.next_action: Candidate-only. If revisited, predeclare simultaneous independent sleeve accounting instead of one-position opportunity blocking, then select priority rules on train/test only.

entries.name: Funding/FX bidirectional with path-efficiency gate
entries.description: Fixed funding-relief long / FX-stress short policy gated on extreme negative 72-bar directional efficiency.
entries.entry_logic: Base long/short entries from funding_relief_vs_fx_stress, both requiring pm_eff_72 <= -0.16331195830142176.
entries.exit_logic: TP4%, SL2.5%, maximum 288 bars, stride6, one position at a time.
entries.evidence: Clears test/eval live-grade ratios with both directions, but has essentially no train edge, sparse OOS trades and negative 2026.
entries.leakage_notes: Gate threshold train-fit but chosen on test2024; eval confirms historically; 2026 consumed and failed. Do not retune.
entries.next_action: Candidate-only, never live-promote without fresh OOS.

usage_recipe.entry_logic: fixed base entries AND pm_eff_72 <= -0.16331195830142176
usage_recipe.exit_logic: TP4 SL2.5 cap288 stride6

evaluation_protocol.mdd: strict intrabar

entries.name: Freshness-safe funding/FX bidirectional Kimchi sleeve
entries.description: Fixed funding-relief long / FX-stress short policy. Long entries require an extreme negative Kimchi-vs-FX local impulse and fail closed unless funding, USDKRW, and Kimchi sources are current; shorts require current USDKRW.
entries.entry_logic: LONG: funding_rate<=-1.67e-05, bd_flow_accel>=0.04082480376734276, kl_local_impulse_144<=-2.2728671107514256, and funding/usdkrw/kimchi availability. SHORT: usdkrw_momentum>=0.0026584830588613, htf_1d_return_1<=-0.03403745751424336, and usdkrw availability.
entries.exit_logic: Next-open TP4%, SL2.5%, maximum 288 bars, stride6, one position at a time; realized funding and 6bp/side included.
entries.evidence: Freshness-repaired, realized-funding replay: selection2024 ratio 2.8465 (30 trades), eval2025 2.3819 (17), 2026H1 4.4049 (28), combined 2025-2026H1 2.7825 (45). Versus frozen rank-7, exact-entry Jaccard is 0, position Jaccard 0.1300, and daily marked-PnL Pearson 0.2109 in 2025-2026H1. This is a low-correlation candidate sleeve, not live-grade standalone.
entries.leakage_notes: Base/gate thresholds were fit before 2024 and the gate was selected on 2024. 2025/2026 had already been viewed in prior research, so they are not pristine discovery OOS. The audit changed no threshold, blocked 484 stale long signal rows, included realized funding, and reproduced frozen rank-7 hashes.
entries.next_action: Freeze as a low-correlation forward-shadow sleeve only. Do not retune on 2025/2026, replace rank-7, or enable live until a new untouched window confirms standalone and portfolio marginal value.

usage_recipe.entry_logic: LONG: funding_rate<=-1.67e-05, bd_flow_accel>=0.04082480376734276, kl_local_impulse_144<=-2.2728671107514256, and funding/usdkrw/kimchi availability. SHORT: usdkrw_momentum>=0.0026584830588613, htf_1d_return_1<=-0.03403745751424336, and usdkrw availability.
usage_recipe.exit_logic: Next-open TP4%, SL2.5%, maximum 288 bars, stride6, one position at a time; realized funding and 6bp/side included.

evaluation_protocol.mdd: strict intratrade OHLC/funding debit
evaluation_protocol.position_model: one position at a time; split-contained exits
evaluation_protocol.orthogonality: exact and near entries, occupied-bar Jaccard, zero-filled daily marked-PnL Pearson/Spearman versus frozen annual rank-7

usage_recipe.live_use_notes: Not live-enabled; forward-shadow candidate only.

trade_orthogonality.interpretation: Current best independent shadow sleeve; economically promising but below standalone live-grade ratio and evaluated on previously viewed future windows.

entries.name: 72-bar jump-continuation bidirectional alpha
entries.description: Trade in the direction of a large signed realized jump when bipower-adjusted jump share and taker-flow acceleration agree.
entries.entry_logic: LONG jv_jump_ratio_72>=0.3173447786, jv_signed_jump_72>=0.1509897808, flow recovery>=0.0251275091; symmetric SHORT lower-tail conditions.
entries.exit_logic: TP1.5%, SL1%, cap96 bars, stride6, next-open.
entries.evidence: Exact rerun reproduced all metrics and independent validator passed leak/cost/split/trade gates.
entries.leakage_notes: No future shift; train thresholds; 2024 selection; eval/2026 attached afterward. 2026 not tuned.
entries.next_action: Do not live-promote; require fresh OOS because train is negative and 2026 weak.

usage_recipe.entry_logic: fixed thresholds listed above
usage_recipe.exit_logic: TP1.5 SL1 cap96 stride6

evaluation_protocol.mdd: strict intrabar

entries.name: Jump continuation with direction-confirming volume clock
entries.description: Reproducible 72-bar jump continuation alpha gated by same-direction signed-flow speed in causal volume time.
entries.entry_logic: Base jump_continuation_72 conditions plus LONG vc_flow_speed_0p25>=0.0003536573 / SHORT <=-0.0004875875.
entries.exit_logic: TP1.5%, SL1%, cap96, stride6.
entries.evidence: Exact rerun matched; independent validator passed. Test/eval both exceed 3 with both directions.
entries.leakage_notes: Train-fit causal thresholds, test-only gate choice, eval/2026 post-selection. No 2026 tuning.
entries.next_action: Do not live-promote; train negative and 2026 weak.

usage_recipe.entry_logic: fixed direction thresholds
usage_recipe.exit_logic: TP1.5 SL1 cap96 stride6

evaluation_protocol.mdd: strict intrabar

entries.name: 72-bar efficient liquidity-recovery continuation
entries.description: Standalone bidirectional BTC alpha using signed path efficiency, aggregate taker flow and short-horizon flow recovery in the same direction.
entries.entry_logic: LONG lr_signed_eff_72>=0.1824548212, lr_flow_72>=0.0486957246, lr_flow_recovery>=0.0679438303; mirrored train-fit SHORT tails.
entries.exit_logic: TP2.5%, SL1.5%, cap144 bars, stride12, next-open.
entries.evidence: 7,885 test-eligible variants scanned; one alpha-pool qualifier. Independent validator passed leak, cost, split and both-side checks.
entries.leakage_notes: Train-fit thresholds, test-only ranking, sealed eval/2026. No future shift or centered rolling.
entries.next_action: Research candidate only; ratio is below live-grade 3 and fresh OOS is required.

usage_recipe.entry_logic: fixed thresholds above
usage_recipe.exit_logic: TP2.5 SL1.5 cap144 stride12

evaluation_protocol.mdd: strict intrabar

entries.name: REX taker-sell / non-high range-position alpha
entries.description: Trade fixed REX reclaim candidates when current taker imbalance is sell-heavy and the seven-day REX range position is not near the upper extreme.
entries.entry_logic: REX reclaim q75 candidate AND taker_imbalance<=-0.07073595391836504 AND rex_2016_range_pos<=0.6865011402825759.
entries.exit_logic: Enter next 5m open, fixed 144 bars (12h), one position at a time.
entries.evidence: Rank 8 inside the pre-2025 Top-10 corrected-MDD conjunction scan; fixed replay gives 54 later-window trades, CAGR/strict-MDD 3.12 and approximate p=0.021.
entries.leakage_notes: Gate thresholds come from train quantiles and the candidate is Top-10 by train+2024 ranking; 2025-2026 are not in the ranking score. The broad research program is retrospective, so require fresh shadow/live OOS before capital deployment.
entries.next_action: Shadow only. Validate live feature parity, collect fresh OOS, and do not tune on 2025-2026 again.

usage_recipe.entry_logic: fixed thresholds listed above
usage_recipe.exit_logic: fixed 144 bars, next-open, no stop/take

evaluation_protocol.mdd: corrected strict intraposition high-water
evaluation_protocol.selection: Top-10 on train+2024; fixed replay on 2025/2026

optional_overlay.description: ExtraTrees TAKE q30 plus 4% take profit; higher combined ratio but only 26 later-window trades.

entries.name: Funding/premium squeeze with central liquidity-impact gate
entries.description: Fixed non-REX funding/premium squeeze long alpha with a train-fit central lr_impact_72 gate applied only to the funding component.
entries.entry_logic: (funding_available>0.5 AND funding_rate<=-0.0000167 AND trend_96>=0.007485218212390219 AND -0.20030301257467914<=lr_impact_72<=0.24664964484849766) OR (premium_available>0.5 AND premium_index_change<=-0.00023471 AND htf_1d_return_4>=0.0940403008961932).
entries.exit_logic: Enter next 5m open; fixed 576 bars; stride 12; one non-overlapping position; no TP/SL.
entries.evidence: Pre-2024 frozen Top-10 manifest rank 8. Corrected strict-MDD replay clears ratio 3 in test2024 (4.31), eval2025 (3.42), 2026 holdout (4.10) and combined (3.03); 69 combined trades, approximate p=5.9e-6. Seven of ten OOS quarters are positive, two have no trades, one is -0.32%; combined approximate p is about 5.9e-5 after conservative Top-10 Bonferroni correction.
entries.leakage_notes: Gate quantiles fit on 2020-2022; variants selected only on 2023/H1/H2 while 2024+ market rows were physically absent. Rank 8 was identified as the sole generalizer after replaying the frozen Top-10, so later evidence carries family multiplicity 10; combined approximate p remains about 5.9e-5 after Bonferroni. Broader base-alpha research had previously inspected later periods, so require fresh forward proof.
entries.next_action: Freeze every threshold. Shadow with live funding/premium availability parity and completed-bar lr_impact_72; do not tune on 2024-2026.

usage_recipe.entry_logic: fixed conditions listed above, including funding_available>0.5 and premium_available>0.5 parity guards
usage_recipe.exit_logic: next-open fixed 576 bars; stride 12; no TP/SL

evaluation_protocol.mdd: corrected strict high-water/adverse-extreme

promotion_guardrails: strict MDD and split-contained exits required
usage_recipe.live_use_notes: Research candidate only; not live-enabled.

entries.name: Funding/premium squeeze with six-alt premium-change outer gate
entries.description: Fixed BTC funding/premium squeeze with the six-alt premium median 24h-change outer gate applied only to the funding component.
entries.entry_logic: (funding_available>0.5 AND funding_rate<=-0.0000167 AND trend_96>=0.007485218212390219 AND alt_premium_available>0.5 AND (alt_premium_median_change288_z2016<=-0.41777540743350977 OR >=0.4309560030698776)) OR (premium_available>0.5 AND premium_index_change<=-0.00023471 AND htf_1d_return_4>=0.0940403008961932).
entries.exit_logic: Enter next 5m open; fixed 576 bars; stride 12; one non-overlapping position; no TP/SL.
entries.evidence: Frozen pre-2024 Top-10 manifest rank 9. It passes the predeclared alpha-pool gate: test/eval ratios 3.66/2.72 with 28/25 trades. It fails live grade because 2026 and combined ratios are 1.56/1.75. Eight of ten OOS quarters are positive; Top-10 Bonferroni combined p is about 0.0135.
entries.leakage_notes: All 15 source prefixes were physically truncated and hashed before manifest selection. Feature fit used 2023H1 and policy selection used only 2023H2. Rank 9 was identified after frozen Top-10 replay; apply multiplicity 10. Broader later-period research still requires fresh forward proof.
entries.next_action: Keep in alpha pool only. Do not enable live; freeze all thresholds and require a new forward period plus live six-alt premium close_time/staleness parity.

usage_recipe.entry_logic: fixed conditions listed above; alt gate applies only to funding component
usage_recipe.exit_logic: next-open fixed 576 bars; stride 12; no TP/SL

evaluation_protocol.mdd: corrected strict high-water/adverse-extreme

promotion_guardrails: all six live premium streams required
no threshold changes from later windows
